name: ASUS PRIME Z790M-PLUS Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt (USB4) Header - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 1Gb LAN
shortName: ASUS PRIME Z790M-PLUS Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Thunderbolt support for compact high-end builds.
